title: First-order Meta-Learned Initialization for Faster Adaptation in Deep Reinforcement Learning
blurbHtml: First-derivative approximations to meta-learning updates perform just as well as second-derivative ones. Demonstrated on RL tasks.

title: Socially compliant path planning
authorsHtml: Abhijat Biswas, Ting-Che Lin, and Sean Wang

title: Automatic Extrinsic Calibration of Stereo Camera and 3D LiDAR
blurbHtml: We implement a method for estimation of MAV poses and dynamic parameters during flight.
